title: Christ the Lord is Risen Today

verses.text: "Christ the Lord is ris'n today," Alleluia! sons of men and angels say; Alleluia! raise your joys and triumphs high; Alleluia! sing ye heav'ns and earth reply. Alleluia!
Love’s redeeming work is done; Alleluia! fought the fight, the battle won; Alleluia! death in vain forbids him rise; Alleluia! Christ hath opened paradise. Alleluia!
Vain the stone, the watch, the seal; Alleluia! Christ hast burst the gates of hell; Alleluia! Death in vain forbids him rise; Alleluia! Christ hath opened paradise. Alleluia!
Lives again our glorious King; Alleluia! where, O death, is now thy sting? Alleluia! Once he died, our souls to save; Alleluia! where thy victory, O grave? Alleluia!
Hail, the Lord of earth and heav'n! Alleluia! Praise to thee by both be giv'n; Alleluia! thee we greet triumphant now; Alleluia! hail, the Resurrection, thou! Alleluia!
